battleTraits.name: Eye of the Gods
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit contesting an objective not controlled by opponent and not in combat, OR a unit that destroyed an enemy unit this turn. Roll on the Eye of the Gods table: 1=No effect, 2=WARD(6+), 3=+1 to run rolls, 4=-1 to wound rolls vs target, 5=+1 Rend, 6=Pick any ability.

enhancements.name: Mark of Khorne
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general's melee weapons if they charged in the same turn.

enhancements.name: Mark of Tzeentch
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.effect: Pick a friendly unit (not your general). Remove it and set it up again wholly within 6" of your general and more than 6" from all enemies. It cannot use Move abilities for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Mark of Nurgle
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks that target your general.

regimentAbilities.name: The Dread Banner
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly Chaos Warriors or Chaos Knights unit. Immediately roll on the Eye of the Gods table for that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Fierce Conquerors
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 3 to the control scores of friendly Chaos Warriors units.

abilities.name: Favoured of the Pantheon
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, you can roll on the Eye of the Gods table for this unit.

abilities.name: Iron-Willed Champion
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" (not this unit), roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target this phase.

abilities.name: Swift Death
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1", roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage.

abilities.name: Bringers of Desolation
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by this unit that target an enemy unit contesting an objective you do not control.

abilities.name: Impaling Charge
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit's Cursed Lances if it charged in the same turn.
